set_fields.acceptance_criteria: Autoresearch uses the new task-scoped /autoresearch command set, task files under .pi/loops/tasks/** with strict frontmatter and stable workflow anchors, persisted phase snapshots under .pi/loops/phases/**, normalized scope paths relative to scope.root, new phases on contract changes, note edits that do not invalidate phases, no steady-state dependence on cwd-global autoresearch files, test coverage for contracts/commands/phases, and extensions/tau gate passes.
